personal.name: Alex Rivera
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
personal.bio: Passionate developer with 5+ years of experience crafting beautiful, performant web applications. I love turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly solutions. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or experimenting with digital art.
personal.tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.

projects.title: NeuralDash
projects.description: AI-powered analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, predictive insights, and customizable widget layouts. Built for enterprise teams handling petabyte-scale datasets.

projects.title: PixelForge Studio
projects.description: Browser-based creative suite for digital artists — vector illustration, pixel art, and animation tools. 50K+ monthly active users and counting.

projects.title: EcoTrack
projects.description: Sustainability platform that helps businesses measure, reduce, and offset their carbon footprint. Features gamified goals and real-time carbon market integration.

projects.title: Verse — Social Reading
projects.description: Next-generation social reading app where readers annotate, discuss, and discover books together. Built-in AI summarisation and personalised recommendations.

projects.title: Pulse CRM
projects.description: Lightweight CRM for indie businesses — contact management, deal pipelines, email sequences, and revenue analytics. Competes with Salesforce at 1% of the price.

projects.title: Orbit — 3D Portfolio
projects.description: Interactive 3D portfolio builder powered by Three.js and AI content generation. Users describe their work and the system assembles a stunning 3D showcase in seconds.

experience.description: Leading the development of Next.js deployment pipelines and edge runtime features. Reduced cold-start latency by 60% through custom caching strategies. Mentoring a team of 6 engineers.
Built the multiplayer presence system and real-time cursor sync using WebSockets and CRDTs. Shipped the Auto Layout 3.0 feature which became the most upvoted release in company history.
Developed internal tooling for fraud detection and risk management. Built a real-time transaction monitoring dashboard processing 10M+ events per day.
Worked across 5 early-stage startups as an embedded developer. Built MVPs from zero to launch in under 3 months each. Gained broad experience across mobile, web, and backend systems.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: Alex transformed our data platform from a confusing mess of spreadsheets into a beautiful, intuitive dashboard. The team's productivity tripled within the first month. Truly exceptional work.

testimonials.name: Marcus Johnson
testimonials.text: One of the most thoughtful engineers I've worked with. Alex has this rare ability to balance technical excellence with user empathy. The Auto Layout work he shipped is still one of our most-loved features.

testimonials.name: Priya Patel
testimonials.text: Alex built our entire platform from scratch in 4 months. The code quality was stellar, the UX was beautiful, and he proactively suggested improvements we hadn't even thought of. Would hire again without hesitation.

testimonials.name: David Kim
testimonials.text: Alex's fraud detection dashboard saved us countless hours of manual review. He delivered clean, well-documented code ahead of schedule and was a pleasure to collaborate with across teams.
